---
title: "Now"
description: "Current focus and active learning areas for Jiho Min."
---

::: {.site-shell .page-shell}
::: {.page-hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
Now
:::

# Current focus.

A simple snapshot of what I am working on and learning right now.
:::

::: {.now-list}
::: {.now-item}
### Redesigning my personal website

Turning this site into a clean portfolio, notes archive, and lightweight homepage.
:::

::: {.now-item}
### Building small web tools

Creating practical projects that can be tested quickly and improved gradually.
:::

::: {.now-item}
### Studying programming and AI workflows

Learning how to use AI carefully for coding, studying, summarizing, and planning.
:::

::: {.now-item}
### Organizing projects and notes

Keeping project ideas, devlogs, and learning notes easier to find.
:::

::: {.now-item}
### Improving productivity systems

Experimenting with browser workflows, study routines, and lightweight dashboards.
:::
:::
:::
